British Library,The

Link | Sample manifest

The “gold standard” for textual criticism. Students can compare the handwriting of major authors or examine the Magna Carta to understand the origins of constitutional law.

manuscripts illumination charter-records codices papyri classical-texts maps music-scores ancient-writings bindings

Note: only with Detekt

Level:

IIIF_logo: 0
